name: myrecsub
description: Personal invoice tracking from email - automatic detection, extraction, and subscription analysis

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:push
scripts.prisma:push: npx dotenv -e .env -- npx prisma db push --schema=backend/prisma/schema.prisma

author: Ron Tenenbaum
